items.name: 🙂‍↔️Spinning head
items.description:
Made for my followers, hyped by collectors, and a flex for resellers—this emote is pure motion 🔄🔥

Whether you're showing off your style, flipping for resale, or just love clean, crazy animations, the 🙂‍↔️ Spinning Head emote is the move. Smooth, chaotic, and totally unique—watch your avatar spin heads literally.

💥 Only 500 available
💸 Built for limited UGC fans & traders
🎁 Dropped exclusively for the community
🌀 Spin it, flex it, resell it
